---
title: "Overall Safety Summary"
subtitle: "Overall Safety Summary"
execute:
  echo: true
  eval: true
---


```{r}
#| label: prereqs
#| include: false
library(arframe)
fr_theme(hlines = "header", font_family = "Courier New")
```

## Setup

See [Prerequisites](../install.qmd) for installation instructions.

```{r}
#| label: setup
library(arframe)
library(pharmaverseadam)
library(dplyr, warn.conflicts = FALSE)
library(tidyr)
library(cards)

blank_to_na <- function(df) {
  df[] <- lapply(df, function(x) {
    if (is.character(x)) x[x == ""] <- NA_character_
    x
  })
  df
}

# Safety population denominator from ADSL
adsl_saf <- pharmaverseadam::adsl |>
  blank_to_na() |>
  filter(SAFFL == "Y", TRT01A != "Screen Failure")

# ADAE: treatment-emergent AEs in safety population
adae <- pharmaverseadam::adae |>
  blank_to_na() |>
  filter(SAFFL == "Y", TRTEMFL == "Y")

arm_levels <- c("Placebo", "Xanomeline Low Dose", "Xanomeline High Dose")
arm_n      <- setNames(
  vapply(arm_levels, function(a) sum(adsl_saf$TRT01A == a), integer(1L)),
  arm_levels
)
N_total    <- nrow(adsl_saf)
n_vec      <- c(arm_n, Total = N_total)

# AE category definitions (flag variable -> display label)
# AEACNOTH does not exist in pharmaverseadam::adae; use AEACN == "DRUG WITHDRAWN"
# for discontinuation and AESDTH == "Y" / AEOUT == "FATAL" for death.
ae_categories <- list(
  list(flag = "TRTEMFL", label = "Any TEAE"),
  list(flag = "AESER",   label = "Any Serious AE (SAE)"),
  list(flag = "AESDTH",  label = "Any AE Leading to Death"),
  list(flag = "AEACN",   label = "Any AE Leading to Discontinuation",
       flag_value = "DRUG WITHDRAWN")
)
```


## Data Preparation

::: {.panel-tabset}

### dplyr

```{r}
#| label: dplyr-code

# ── Helper: subjects with flag == flag_value in adae, per arm + Total ──
# flag_value defaults to "Y" for standard dichotomous flags.
ae_flag_row <- function(ae_data, adsl_data, flag_var, row_label, arm_levels, N_total,
                        flag_value = "Y") {
  # Unique subjects in adae with flag == flag_value
  flag_subjs <- ae_data |>
    filter(.data[[flag_var]] == flag_value) |>
    distinct(USUBJID, TRT01A)

  by_arm <- flag_subjs |>
    count(TRT01A) |>
    complete(TRT01A = arm_levels, fill = list(n = 0L)) |>
    left_join(
      adsl_data |> count(TRT01A, name = "N"),
      by = "TRT01A"
    ) |>
    mutate(pct = sprintf("%d (%.1f)", n, n / N * 100)) |>
    select(TRT01A, pct) |>
    pivot_wider(names_from = TRT01A, values_from = pct)

  total_n <- n_distinct(flag_subjs$USUBJID)
  by_arm |>
    mutate(
      stat_label = row_label,
      Total      = sprintf("%d (%.1f)", total_n, total_n / N_total * 100),
      .before    = 1
    )
}

ae_wide <- lapply(ae_categories, function(cat) {
  ae_flag_row(
    ae_data    = adae,
    adsl_data  = adsl_saf,
    flag_var   = cat$flag,
    row_label  = cat$label,
    arm_levels = arm_levels,
    N_total    = N_total,
    flag_value = if (!is.null(cat$flag_value)) cat$flag_value else "Y"
  )
}) |>
  bind_rows()
```

### cards

```{r}
#| label: cards-code

# Build one row per subject with dichotomous AE flags
ae_subj <- adsl_saf |>
  select(USUBJID, TRT01A) |>
  left_join(
    adae |>
      group_by(USUBJID) |>
      summarise(
        any_teae  = any(TRTEMFL == "Y",             na.rm = TRUE),
        any_sae   = any(AESER   == "Y",             na.rm = TRUE),
        any_death = any(AESDTH  == "Y",             na.rm = TRUE),
        any_dc    = any(AEACN   == "DRUG WITHDRAWN", na.rm = TRUE),
        .groups = "drop"
      ),
    by = "USUBJID"
  ) |>
  mutate(across(c(any_teae, any_sae, any_death, any_dc), ~ replace_na(.x, FALSE)))

ae_ard <- ard_stack(
  data = ae_subj,
  .by  = "TRT01A",
  ard_dichotomous(
    variables = c(any_teae, any_sae, any_death, any_dc),
    value     = list(
      any_teae  = TRUE,
      any_sae   = TRUE,
      any_death = TRUE,
      any_dc    = TRUE
    )
  ),
  .overall = TRUE
)

ae_wide <- fr_wide_ard(
  ae_ard,
  statistic = list(dichotomous = "{n} ({p}%)"),
  decimals  = c(p = 1),
  label     = c(
    any_teae  = "Any TEAE",
    any_sae   = "Any Serious AE (SAE)",
    any_death = "Any AE Leading to Death",
    any_dc    = "Any AE Leading to Discontinuation"
  )
) |>
  select(-stat_label) |>
  rename(stat_label = variable)
```

:::


## arframe Pipeline

The `fr_table()` pipeline for the dplyr path:

```{r}
#| label: pipeline
#| eval: false
ae_wide |>
  fr_table() |>
  fr_titles(
    "Table 14.3.1",
    "Overall Safety Summary",
    "Safety Population"
  ) |>
  fr_cols(
    stat_label = fr_col("", width = 3.2),
    !!!setNames(
      lapply(arm_levels, function(a) fr_col(a, align = "decimal")),
      arm_levels
    ),
    Total = fr_col("Total", align = "decimal"),
    .n = n_vec
  ) |>
  fr_header(bold = TRUE, align = "center") |>
  fr_footnotes(
    "TEAEs = Treatment-Emergent Adverse Events (onset on or after first dose).",
    "Subjects counted once per category regardless of number of events.",
    "Percentages based on N per treatment group.",
    "CDISCPILOT01 Safety Population."
  )
```


## Rendered Table

```{r}
#| label: rendered-table
#| echo: false
#| ref.label: pipeline
```
